data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for real-time status updates indicating 'Claimed by someone else'. However, the evidence provided does not confirm that this requirement is met. While the linked use case describes the scenario where users receive a denial message, there is no concrete evidence showing that the system effectively communicates this status to the users involved, leading to a gap in requirement satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence of the system providing real-time status updates to users who were denied booking.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
